title: Ryan Clifford VR
description: Quilt+Vivecraft Modpack used in the Minecraft VR Series by @RyanClifford
body:
This modpack gives you all the mods, shaders and resource packs seen in [@RyanClifford](https://www.youtube.com/@RyanClifford)'s Minecraft VR series.

- https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=F7dOyyBujxI
- https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=8gqGp7TV-9E
- https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=XKYtCKRbwOI

This does not include [Physics Mod Pro](https://minecraftphysicsmod.com/download) or [Sildurs Vibrant Shaders](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/customization/sildurs-vibrant-shaders/files?version=1.19.2) because of copyright issues.

The only changes i made is the use of Quilt instead of Fabric (Will still load fabric mods just fine) and the inclusion of Not Enough Crashes, because having to restart while in VR is annoying af.

Links for licensing purposes:
- https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/illuminations
- https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/falling-leaves-fabric
- https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/effective
- https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/fresh-animations
